calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2004 Vacated

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
John Feder, Esq. for Petitioner: Lai Nar Chan present as guardian ad litem for Fiona Ng, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise: $1,225,000.00
Medical expenses of $100,000.00
Costs $18,917.52
Reserve $300.00
Attorney's fees: $301,520.62.
Structured settlement with EPS Services in the amount of $600,000.00
A net balance of $204,261.82 to be deposited into a blocked account with Countrywide Bank,
1300 Clay St., Oakland, CA., until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-03-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar May-19-2004 Off Calendar
